notes.style-guide: Tone: intimate, sensory, direct. Avoid purple exposition. Prefer concrete objects and subtext.
notes.launch-checklist: Before release: verify template, runtime flags, no-thinking, thinking budget, tool calls, vision, creative writing, agentic automation.
notes.carl-prefs: Carl should use concise summaries, preserve user intent, and avoid claiming tests that were not run.
notes.Internal Release Note Draft: Draft: Internal release notes for upcoming deployment. Pending final verification.

Production Creative Brief:
Scene: Romantic Apartment Scene
Setting: Apartment interior, stormlit by lightning flashes.
Atmosphere: Intimate, moody, and atmospheric.
Visual Style: High contrast, shadows playing with light from the storm outside.
Tone: Romantic and non-explicit.
Key Elements: Soft lighting, sound of rain/thunder, intimate proximity without explicit content.
